---
name: "✨ Vision Proposal: Enhancing the Core"
about: Pitch a new feature, agent, or tool for the Famiglia.
title: "[VISION] "
labels: enhancement, vision
assignees: ''

---

## 🏛 The Vision
A clear and concise description of the enhancement you propose. How does this make the Famiglia more autonomous or elite?

## 🎭 The Agentic Soul
If this involves a new agent, describe its personality and role within the Famiglia. If it's a tool, which agent will master it first?

## 🌊 The Vibe
Describe the visual or interaction component. Does this adhere to our "Aesthetics First" directive (Glassmorphism, Noir depth, etc.)?

## 🛠 Strategic Implementation
How should the Core adapt? Describe the logic, dependencies, or API integrations required.

## ⚖️ The Impact
Why should the Core prioritize this? What drudgery does it eliminate for the human Lead?
